questions.question: Write a step-by-step explanation of how the Insertion Sort algorithm works, including its time complexity and space complexity.
questions.hint: Focus on the key differences with other sorting algorithms

questions.question: How does the Insertion Sort algorithm differ from the Selection Sort algorithm? Provide an example to illustrate the difference.
questions.hint: Use a sample array to demonstrate the difference

questions.question: Implement the Insertion Sort algorithm in a programming language of your choice. Provide the code and explain the time and space complexity of your implementation.
questions.hint: Focus on the efficiency and scalability of the algorithm
